seoTitle: Moonta Bay vs Moonta Mines — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moonta Bay and Moonta Mines. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Moonta Bay vs Moonta Mines: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moonta Bay and Moonta Mines.
heading: Moonta Bay vs Moonta Mines — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moonta Bay, South Australia and Moonta Mines, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moonta Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Moonta Mines (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moonta Bay or Moonta Mines safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moonta Bay has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Moonta Mines scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moonta Bay scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Moonta Mines scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moonta Bay or Moonta Mines?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moonta Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
